payload.title: Financial and Ridership Reports – January 2026
payload.description: MTA New York City Transit, Bus Company, and Staten Island Railway financial and ridership reports for January 2026, including budget vs actual performance, staffing, and variance explanations.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: MTA New York City Transit - operator of subway and bus services in New York City
MTA Bus Company - operator of bus services in New York City
MTA Staten Island Railway - operator of rail service on Staten Island

tool_args.label: NYCT Total Revenue vs Budget Jan 2026 YTD

payload.description: Total revenues of $482.1 million were $15.2 million (3.0%) lower than the Budget

tool_args.label: NYCT Total Paid Ridership Jan 2026 YTD

payload.description: Total paid ridership was 125.7 million which was lower than the Budget by 0.6 million (0.4%)
Total expenses of $1,253.5 million were $6.5 million (0.5%) lower than the Budget
At the end of January, total headcount was 47,535 which was 2,824 lower than the Budget of 50,360
Farebox Revenues were $3.0 million (1.0%) unfavorable mainly due to lower than projected Bus paid ridership
Year-to-date January Farebox Operating Ratio was 31.7%, which was 0.8% lower than the Budget
Subway farebox revenue - Preliminary Actual $241.0 million, $8.1 million (3.5%) favorable to Budget
NYCT Bus farebox revenue - Preliminary Actual $45.7 million, ($10.8 million) (19.2%) unfavorable to Budget
Subway ridership 99.5 million, 3.1 million (3.2%) higher than Budget
NYCT Bus ridership 25.0 million, (3.6 million) (12.5%) lower than Budget
Year-to-date January Cost per Passenger was $7.51, higher than the Budget by $0.17 per passenger
Year-to-date January Revenue per Passenger was $2.38, lower than the Budget by $0.01 per passenger

tool_args.label: Bus Company Total Revenue Jan 2026 YTD

payload.description: Total revenues of $14.8 million were $3.6 million (19.5%) unfavorable to the Adopted Budget

tool_args.label: Bus Company Paid Ridership Jan 2026 YTD

payload.description: Total paid ridership of 6.4 million was 0.8 million (10.9%) lower than the Budget

tool_args.label: Bus Company Total Expenses Jan 2026 YTD

payload.description: Total expenses of $87.8 million were $4.5 million (4.8%) favorable to the Budget
Total headcount was 4,035, which was 22 lower than the Budget of 4,057

tool_args.label: Bus Company Farebox Operating Ratio Jan 2026

payload.description: January year-to-date Farebox Operating Ratio was 16.3%, unfavorable to the Budget by 2.5%

tool_args.label: Bus Company Cost per Passenger Jan 2026

payload.description: January year-to-date Cost per Passenger was $12.61, unfavorable to the Budget by $0.76

tool_args.label: Bus Company Revenue per Passenger Jan 2026

payload.description: January year-to-date Revenue per Passenger was $2.06, lower than the Budget by $0.17
Total revenues of $0.791 million were $0.361 million (31.4%) lower than the Adopted Budget

tool_args.label: SIR Total Paid Ridership Jan 2026 YTD

payload.description: Total paid ridership was 0.183 million, 5.5% lower than the Budget
Total expenses of $10.036 million were $0.566 million (6.0%) higher than the Budget
Total headcount was 406, 29 positions lower than the Budget of 435
Year-to-date January Farebox Operating Ratio was 5.4%, lower than the Budget by 0.5 percentage points
Year-to-date January Cost per Passenger was $39.33, higher than the Budget by $1.34 per passenger
Year-to-date January Revenue per Passenger was $2.12, lower than the Budget by $0.13 per passenger

payload.claim_text: Overtime was $13.9 million (30.9%) unfavorable primarily due to higher than projected absentee coverage needs and vacancies and severe weather conditions
payload.subject: NYCT overtime

tool_args.label: NYCT Farebox Revenue Variance Reason Jan 2026

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenue variance of ($3.0) million (1.0%) primarily due to lower Bus paid ridership
payload.subject: NYCT farebox revenue

tool_args.label: Bus Company Farebox Revenue Variance Reason Jan 2026

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenue variance of ($2,826) (17.6%) primarily due to lower ridership
payload.subject: MTA Bus Company farebox revenue

tool_args.label: Bus Company Professional Service Contracts Variance

payload.claim_text: Professional Service Contracts favorable by $1.549 million (37.8%) primarily due to timing of bus technology service contracts
payload.subject: MTA Bus Company professional service contracts

tool_args.label: SIR Farebox Revenue Variance Reason Jan 2026

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenue variance of ($0.038) million (11.9%) unfavorable due to lower than anticipated ridership
payload.subject: SIR farebox revenue

tool_args.label: Preliminary close - results subject to adjustment

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Current month's actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.
payload.description: The financial results throughout this report are based on a preliminary close and are subject to review and adjustment; post-close adjustments will be captured in subsequent months.

tool_args.label: Source reports on Staten Island Railway

payload.description: Labor Expenses: $22.5 million (3.3%) unfavorable
Farebox revenue of $13.251 million, ($2.826 million) (17.6%) unfavorable to Budget
SIR farebox revenue of $0.279 million, $0.038 million (11.9%) unfavorable to Budget
Paratransit ridership 1.2 million, (0.1 million) (6.4%) lower than Budget
